purpose: Test one preregistered multi-lookback t-stat candidate against the locked L-1 60-day directional-count baseline without selecting horizons, costs, timing, or utility after observing results.
owner_authorization: The owner explicitly authorized B5 on 2026-07-24, with no backtest, validation access, broker/provider call, or paid action in this session.

baseline_inheritance.comparison_rule: Candidate and baseline use identical inherited universe, availability timestamps, one-session execution delay, sizing, rebalancing, cost model, return accounting, benchmarks, dates, and missingness handling. Only the signal differs.

candidate_signal.name: equal_weight_multi_lookback_t_stat
candidate_signal.component_formula: For each asset and horizon h, t_stat_h[t] = mean of the h prior available daily economic returns divided by their sample standard deviation times sqrt(h); require h complete observations and use no return at or after t.
candidate_signal.component_zero_variance_rule: Set that component to 0 and record the event; do not substitute an epsilon or drop the asset.
candidate_signal.combined_signal_formula: q_multi[t] = arithmetic mean of tanh(t_stat_h[t]) across the four locked horizons.
candidate_signal.same_signal_availability_rule: The candidate signal is frozen before the inherited one-session execution delay; same-close execution is forbidden.
candidate_signal.horizon_rationale: 32, 64, 126, and 252 sessions are the source-supported multi-lookback set that fits the inherited L-1 warm-up and timing. The 504-session source horizon is excluded because it would change that inherited timing.

comparison_and_utility.observation_unit: paired same-date daily net portfolio-return difference: candidate minus baseline
comparison_and_utility.primary_utility: annualized net Sharpe(candidate) minus annualized net Sharpe(baseline) on identical eligible dates
comparison_and_utility.secondary_diagnostic: candidate turnover must not exceed baseline turnover by more than 20 percent; this diagnostic cannot replace the primary utility.
comparison_and_utility.selection_rule: Only primary_32_64_126_252 can support the L-2 claim. A sensitivity cannot be promoted, substituted, or used to revise the utility threshold.

search_accounting_and_DSR.effective_trials_for_DSR: maximum of 5 and the effective-rank estimate from the complete locked trial-return correlation matrix
search_accounting_and_DSR.trial_sharpe_dispersion: Population standard deviation across the complete locked trial inventory on the evaluated window; no omitted failed trial.
search_accounting_and_DSR.DSR_requirement: DSR probability for the selected primary candidate versus its search-aware hurdle must be at least 0.95 before validation-grade candidacy.
additional_search_forbidden: universe, timing, sizing, cost, benchmark, regime, or date-window selection
search_accounting_and_DSR.debug_run_rule: Any run that reads market returns is a logged trial even if labelled debugging; synthetic fixture tests are not trials.

dual_MinTRL.actual_recalculation: Use paired-difference return lags 1-5 from the prior opened stage. Report calendar observations, paired dates, holding overlap, time-effective observations, and joint independent-bet equivalents; raw trades never substitute for effective observations.

validation_seal.unlock_rule: No L-2 validation access in B5. A later execution order must first pass the inherited L-1 data and validation boundary, fund every L-2 MinTRL_validate null using actual paired dependence, and receive separate owner approval and a new locked gate.

decision_rules.falsified: After MinTRL_falsify is funded, primary utility is below 0.0 and the turnover diagnostic fails, with a written mechanism autopsy covering horizon diversification, lag, noise, and cost.
decision_rules.not_falsified_but_not_validated: Any underpowered, mixed, missing-data, cost-limited, or sealed-validation result remains E1 scope_restricted.
decision_rules.validation_grade_candidate: The primary utility is at least 0.10, DSR is at least 0.95 using the complete trial log, both MinTRL_validate nulls are funded, and inherited integrity, cost, regime, and adversarial-review gates pass.
decision_rules.E2_promotion: A separate independent adversarial review with no unresolved critical issue is required; B5 cannot promote L-2.

hard_stops: L-2 return, signal, portfolio, or backtest execution during B5
broker or provider request, credential use, paid action, paper trade, or real-money action
in-place change to this preregistration or validator after hashing
edge, E2, execution-quality, deployment, or real-money claim from B5
